text: System shall run on a deterministic sim tick
All inter-module messages shall be timestamped
System shall operate ARINC429-lite and AFDX-lite concurrently
System shall enforce partition-level fault containment
System shall support sensor bus partition and compute fault injection
All test results shall be exported as evidence bundle
Evidence bundle shall include git SHA tool version seed and hash
System shall provide bidirectional req-test trace
System shall report orphan requirements and trace gaps
System shall log deadline misses to health monitor
System shall support cold and warm start sequences
System shall log degraded mode entry and exit
AI assistant outputs shall be draft and never auto-merged
Workbench UI shall surface mode confusion risk items
System shall produce MC/DC coverage for designated functions
System shall not depend on wall-clock
All random sources shall be seed injected
System shall publish/subscribe only ICD registered messages
System shall verify message schema version
Monitor lane shall compute independently of command lane
System shall transition to safe state on dual sensor fault
Fault injection shall be reproducible by config
Escaped faults shall be auto reported
Evidence bundle shall be re-runnable standalone
System shall produce statement branch and decision coverage
All requirements shall have unique ID source rationale criticality
Requirement changes shall follow CR -> impact -> approval
Health monitor shall map fault to action via config
Partition shall not exceed its budget
Mode change shall be notified within 1 sim tick
Alerts shall be ordered warning caution advisory
Color usage shall follow red amber green rule
In-house tools shall document DO-330 usage and limits
DC shall timestamp every sensor input before publish
DC shall mark stale inputs with freshness flag
DC shall flag out-of-range inputs as INVALID
DC shall include sensor source ID in messages
DC shall align publish rate with partition period
DC shall detect sensor dropout within N ticks
DC shall report own health to HM
FCC inputs shall pass range rate and freshness checks
FCC command and monitor lanes shall compute independently
FCC shall transition to ALTERNATE on lane disagreement
FCC shall revert to DIRECT on dual sensor fault
FCC mode change shall notify DSP within 1 tick
FCC shall implement NORMAL ALTERNATE DIRECT OFF modes
FCC command output shall pass a limiter
FCC shall self-test on startup
Engine I/F shall classify exceedances as caution or warning
Engine I/F shall latch exceedance with hysteresis
Engine I/F shall detect hot and hung start patterns
Engine I/F shall keep latched exceedance until end of run
Engine I/F shall monitor EGT rise rate
Engine I/F shall report exceedance events to HM
Engine I/F shall load limit table from config
DSP shall order alerts warning caution advisory
DSP shall follow red amber green color rule
DSP shall update mode annunciation within 100 ms of FCC notice
DSP shall cap visible alerts and summarize the rest
DSP shall display dashed value on stale input
DSP shall keep mode history for N seconds
DSP shall measure its own refresh rate
HM shall collect partition deadline and IPC errors
HM shall map faults to actions per config
HM shall record all events to trace DB
HM shall be able to trigger partition restart
HM shall decide cold/warm start transition
HM shall meet its own deadline
